languages.text: "Сектором Бионика руковожу я. Мне вовсе не хочется принижать заслуги членов Адептус Механикус вообще и Ферренца в частности, однако в деле врачевания им есть чему поучиться у Официо Медике". {n}В голосе Мартинакса слышится явное удовольствие.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Сектором Бионика руковожу я. Мне вовсе не хочется принижать заслуги членов Адептус Механикус вообще и Ферренца в частности, однако в деле врачевания им есть чему поучиться у Официо Медике". {n}В голосе Мартинакса слышится явное удовольствие.{/n}

languages.text: "I am in charge of the Sector Bionica. I do not mean to belittle the servants of the Adeptus Mechanicus in general, and certainly not Ferrenz in particular, but they have much to learn from the Officio Medicae when it comes to healing." {n}Martinax's voice sounds undeniably smug.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Сектором Бионика руковожу я. Мне вовсе не хочется принижать заслуги членов Адептус Механикус вообще и Ферренца в частности, однако в деле врачевания им есть чему поучиться у Официо Медике". {n}В голосе Мартинакса слышится явное удовольствие.{/n}

I do not mean to belittle the servants of the Adeptus Mechanicus in general, and certainly not Ferrenz in particular, but they have much to learn from the Officio Medicae when it comes to healing." {n}Martinax's voice sounds undeniably smug.{/n}

"I am in charge of the Sector Bionica. I do not mean to belittle the servants of the Adeptus Mechanicus in general, and certainly not Ferrenz in particular, but they have much to learn from the Officio Medicae when it comes to healing." {n}Martinax's voice sounds undeniably smug.{/n}

"I am in charge of the Sector Bionica. I do not mean to belittle the servants of the Adeptus Mechanicus in general, and certainly not Ferrenz in particular, but they have much to learn from the Officio Medicae when it comes to healing." {n}Martinax's voice sounds undeniably smug.{/n}

languages.text: 「私はバイオニカ部門の責任者です。一般の機械神官の奉仕者、特にフェレンツを軽視するつもりはありませんが、治療に関しては、メディカエオフィシウムから学ぶべきことは多いのです」{n}マルタックスの声は、確かに満足げに聞こえます。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I am in charge of the Sector Bionica. I do not mean to belittle the servants of the Adeptus Mechanicus in general, and certainly not Ferrenz in particular, but they have much to learn from the Officio Medicae when it comes to healing." {n}Martinax's voice sounds undeniably smug.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「私はバイオニカ部門の責任者です。一般の機械神官の奉仕者、特にフェレンツを軽視するつもりはありませんが、治療に関しては、メディカエオフィシウムから学ぶべきことは多いのです。」{n}マルタックスの声は、確かに満足げに聞こえます。{/n}

languages.text: "Sektör Biyonika'dan ben sorumluyum. Genel olarak Adeptus Mechanicus'un hizmetkârlarını ve özellikle de Ferrenz'i küçümsemek istemem ama konu iyileştirme olduğunda Officio Medicae'den öğrenecekleri çok şey var." {n}Martinax'ın sesi, inkâr edilemez bir şekilde kendini beğenmiş çıkıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I am in charge of the Sector Bionica. I do not mean to belittle the servants of the Adeptus Mechanicus in general, and certainly not Ferrenz in particular, but they have much to learn from the Officio Medicae when it comes to healing." {n}Martinax's voice sounds undeniably smug.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Sektör Biyonika'dan ben sorumluyum. Genel olarak Adeptus Mechanicus'un hizmetkârlarını ve özellikle de Ferrenz'i küçümsemek istemem ama konu iyileştirme olduğunda Officio Medicae'den öğrenecekleri çok şey var." {n}Martinax'ın sesi, inkâr edilemez bir şekilde kendini beğenmiş çıkıyor.{/n}

languages.text: «Estoy a cargo del Sector Bionica. No quiero menospreciar a los sirvientes del Adeptus Mechanicus en general, y desde luego no a Ferrenz en particular, pero tienen mucho que aprender del Officio Medicae en lo que se refiere a la curación». {n}La voz de Martinax está cargada de una satisfacción inconfundible.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I am in charge of the Sector Bionica. I do not mean to belittle the servants of the Adeptus Mechanicus in general, and certainly not Ferrenz in particular, but they have much to learn from the Officio Medicae when it comes to healing." {n}Martinax's voice sounds undeniably smug.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Estoy a cargo del Sector Bionica. No quiero menospreciar a los sirvientes del Adeptus Mechanicus en general, y desde luego no a Ferrenz en particular, pero tienen mucho que aprender del Officio Medicae en lo que se refiere a la curación». {n}La voz de Martinax está cargada de una satisfacción inconfundible.{/n}

languages.text: “我掌管整个仿生区。我无意贬低机械修会的侍奉者，更不是针对费伦茨，但在治疗方面，他们的确还有许多东西要向医疗机构学习。”{n}马丁纳克斯的声音听起来无疑有些得意。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I am in charge of the Sector Bionica. I do not mean to belittle the servants of the Adeptus Mechanicus in general, and certainly not Ferrenz in particular, but they have much to learn from the Officio Medicae when it comes to healing." {n}Martinax's voice sounds undeniably smug.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我掌管整个仿生区。我无意贬低机械修会的侍奉者，更不是针对费伦茨，但在治疗方面，他们的确还有许多东西要向医疗机构学习。”{n}马丁纳克斯的声音听起来无疑有些得意。{/n}

languages.text: « C'est moi qui suis responsable du secteur Bionica. Sans vouloir médire des serviteurs de l'Adeptus Mechanicus en général, et encore moins de Ferrenz en particulier, ils ont beaucoup à apprendre de l'Officio Medicae en matière de soins, » {n}déclare Martinax sur un ton indéniablement fier.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I am in charge of the Sector Bionica. I do not mean to belittle the servants of the Adeptus Mechanicus in general, and certainly not Ferrenz in particular, but they have much to learn from the Officio Medicae when it comes to healing." {n}Martinax's voice sounds undeniably smug.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « C'est moi qui suis responsable du secteur Bionica. Sans vouloir médire des serviteurs de l'Adeptus Mechanicus en général, et encore moins de Ferrenz en particulier, ils ont beaucoup à apprendre de l'Officio Medicae en matière de soins, » {n}déclare Martinax sur un ton indéniablement fier.{/n}

languages.text: "Ich leite den Sektor Bionika. Ich will die Diener des Adeptus Mechanicus im Allgemeinen nicht herabwürdigen, und schon gar nicht Ferrenz im Besonderen, aber wenn es um Heilung geht, haben sie vom Officio Medicae noch viel zu lernen." {n}Martinax' Stimme klingt ohne Zweifel überheblich.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I am in charge of the Sector Bionica. I do not mean to belittle the servants of the Adeptus Mechanicus in general, and certainly not Ferrenz in particular, but they have much to learn from the Officio Medicae when it comes to healing." {n}Martinax's voice sounds undeniably smug.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ich leite den Sektor Bionika.
